# Session Summary — May 5, 2026

## Fix: Task Title Click Not Opening Drawer in My Tasks

**Problem:** Clicking a task title in `/admin/my-tasks` did nothing — the detail drawer never opened.

**Root cause:** The `onclick` attribute was generated by embedding `JSON.stringify(task)` directly inside `onclick="admtOpenDetail(...)"`. JSON uses double quotes `"` for all keys and string values, but the HTML attribute itself is also delimited by `"`. The first `"` inside the JSON string prematurely ended the attribute, producing malformed HTML that the browser silently discarded — leaving the click handler never registered.

**Fix:** Added `.replace(/"/g, '&quot;')` to the JSON string before injecting it into the attribute. The HTML parser decodes `&quot;` → `"` before evaluating the JavaScript expression, so `admtOpenDetail` receives a valid object.

**File changed:**
- `views/admin/my-tasks.ejs` — line ~506, one-line fix in the `render()` function

---

## Feature: Change Password in New Admin Hub

**Problem:** There was no way for any user (LOCAL_ADMIN, LOCAL_MANAGER, or LOCAL_USER) to change their own password while in the new admin hub UI. The only option was via the classic UI.

**Approach:** Added a change-password modal triggered from the sidebar. Used the existing `POST /change-password` API endpoint (no backend changes needed). The endpoint accepts `{ new_password, confirm_password }` and is accessible to all authenticated users.

**UI iterations:**
1. First attempt: added a "Password" button in the `.adm-footer-btns` row alongside Classic and Sign out — looked cluttered with 3 equal-width buttons squashed into the footer.
2. Final design: removed the footer button; added a small key icon button (`<i class="bi bi-key">`) inline with the user row (to the right of the name/role), with a subtle border and accent-colour hover effect.

**Modal features:**
- Centered overlay (click outside to close)
- Two fields: New Password + Confirm Password
- Client-side validation: both required, min 6 chars, must match
- Disabled submit button during request to prevent double-submit
- Inline success/error message; auto-closes 1.4s after success
- Enter key in Confirm field submits the form

**Files changed:**
- `views/admin/layout.ejs` — CSS for `.adm-cpwd-*` classes; key icon button in user row; modal HTML; inline JS IIFE for open/close/submit

---

## Summary of Files Changed

**Modified:**
- `views/admin/my-tasks.ejs` — fix `onclick` JSON quote escaping
- `views/admin/layout.ejs` — change password modal + key icon in sidebar user row
